schema.ion.id › trade › contract › v1

trade/contract/v1

Pack IRI: https://schema.ion.id/trade/contract/v1#  |  Layer: L5 — Trade sector  |  Version: v1

context.jsonld attributes.yaml vocab.jsonld

Schemas in this pack

TradeContractAttributes

IRI: https://schema.ion.id/trade/contract/v1#TradeContractAttributes

PropertyMandatoryDescription
fulfillingLocationId—ID of the specific fulfilment centre that will fulfil this order. Populated by BPP at on_confirm after internal FC selec
buyerInstructions—Free-text delivery instructions from buyer. e.g. "Leave at door", "Call before arriving", "Do not ring bell after 9pm".
deliveryPreferences—
invoicePreferences—Buyer's invoice type and tax identity declaration.
fakturPajakReference—Faktur Pajak (e-Invoice) reference number assigned by BPP after contract confirm for PKP sellers. 16-digit DJP format.
purchaseOrderReference—Buyer's Purchase Order number for B2B wholesale transactions. Allows buyer to link ION contract to their internal PO sys
cancellationReasonCode—Standardised cancellation reason code when contract is cancelled. Set by BPP on contract at time of cancellation.
quoteTrail—Trail of quote changes for price adjustment branch. Each entry records a delta to the original confirmed quote.
partialCancellationAllowed—Whether individual items in a multi-item order can be cancelled.
replacementPreferred—Whether buyer prefers replacement over refund in case of defective or wrong item. Declared at confirm.
disputeWindowDays—Number of days after delivery within which buyer may raise a dispute. Defaults to ION network policy if not declared.
creditTermsDays—Number of days credit extended to the buyer from delivery date. 0 = prepaid. Common values: 7, 14, 30, 45, 60, 90.
paymentDueDate—Absolute datetime by which payment must be made for credit orders. Computed from delivery date + creditTermsDays.
subscriptionBillingCycle—Billing cycle for subscription commerce pattern.
subscriptionNextBillingDate—Date-time of next billing event. Updated by BPP after each successful billing.
linkedContractId—Reference to the Trade Contract this Logistics Contract serves. Enables ION Central to trace causal relationship between
codAmount—Total cash amount to be collected from consumer at delivery for COD orders. String decimal in IDR.
beaCukaiReference—Indonesian Customs (Bea Cukai) clearance reference number. Required for all international inbound shipments.
liveCommerceContext—Context for orders placed via live commerce or social commerce (TikTok Shop, Shopee Live, Tokopedia Play, OTT-embedded c
refundDestination—Where refund will be credited. When buyer does not specify, default is ORIGINAL_PAYMENT_METHOD. Platform wallets often f
subscriptionTrialDays—First N days free. Billing starts on day N+1.
subscriptionPauseType—Current pause state for B2C-SUB orders
subscriptionPauseUntil—Date to automatically resume. Required when pauseType=PAUSED_UNTIL_DATE
giftingDetails—Structured gifting details replacing the simple gift flag.
paymentSchedule—Multi-milestone payment schedule for partial-payment offers (down-payment + balance, milestone-based for services, etc.)

Pack README

trade/contract/v1

Order-level contract attributes — buyer instructions, gift, invoice preferences, credit terms, subscription.

Attaches to

`beckn:Contract.contractAttributes`

See `attributes.yaml` for complete field definitions.

Part of schema.ion.id — ION Network vocabulary. Built from schema/extensions/trade/contract/v1/ in the ion-network spec. Generated 2026-04-27 18:43 UTC.
